message:
feat: Add StreamingContext wrapper (Phase 2.1)

Created StreamingContext in llama.zig as THE main inference path:

Architecture:
- Replaces llama.cpp Model.load() with Zell's streaming engine
- Uses Q2_K compressed models (~10GB for 32B)
- All 64 layers fit in RAM (no SSD streaming!)
- CPU dequantizes Q2_K while GPU computes (heterogeneous)

API:
- StreamingContext.init() - Load Q2_K model, warm all layers to heap
- StreamingContext.generate() - Placeholder for Phase 2.3
- StreamingContext.deinit() - Cleanup

Imports:
- gguf_loader, streaming_qwen, model_hash

Next: Phase 2.2 - Replace llama.cpp in main.zig
